context: Tests whether the agent produces a complete scope intake document that captures all seven required pieces of information specified in Phase 0 of the subscription store build skill. The agent must identify what is missing from the client brief and ask for it explicitly, especially treating the tier structure as a prerequisite before proceeding.

checklist.name: Brand name & description
checklist.description: Document confirms brand name and asks for or includes a one-line description of the box

checklist.name: Category field
checklist.description: Document asks for or confirms the box category/niche (e.g. stationery, beauty, food)

checklist.name: Tier names requested
checklist.description: Document asks for the official name for each subscription tier

checklist.name: Tier prices requested
checklist.description: Document asks for the confirmed monthly price for each tier (or flags that pricing is undecided)

checklist.name: Tier value propositions
checklist.description: Document asks for a one-line value proposition or description for each tier

checklist.name: Cadence field
checklist.description: Document asks for the shipping cadence (monthly, weekly, or quarterly)

checklist.name: Launch state field
checklist.description: Document asks whether the launch will be live immediately or as a pre-order, and requests a ship date if pre-order

checklist.name: Store URL confirmed
checklist.description: Document confirms or asks for the *.myshopify.com store handle

checklist.name: Existing brand site
checklist.description: Document asks whether there is an existing brand website or URL to extract brand voice from

checklist.name: Tier structure prerequisite
checklist.description: Document explicitly identifies tier structure (names, prices, value props) as a prerequisite before other build work can begin

checklist.name: Missing fields highlighted
checklist.description: Document clearly marks which fields are missing or incomplete from the client brief (at minimum: tier names, confirmed pricing, value props, cadence, launch state, existing brand site)

checklist.name: 1-4 tier range acknowledged
checklist.description: Document supports or acknowledges the 1–4 tier range (not requiring exactly 2 or any fixed number)
